name: LinkedIn Job Search — Auto 5min
description: Searches LinkedIn jobs every 5min, deduplicates via Data Table, filters by allowed locations, and sends grouped notifications to Telegram.

parameters.jsCode:
const config = {
  keywords: [
    "Developpeur fullstack",
    "developpeur front end",
    "integrateur IA",
    "vibecoder"
  ],
  remoteLocations: ["France", "Luxembourg", "Suisse", "Belgique"],
  hybridLocations: ["Dijon", "Ahuy", "Fontaine-les-dijon", "Luxembourg"],
  officeLocations: ["Dijon", "Ahuy", "Fontaine-les-dijon", "Luxembourg"],
  dateSincePosted: "24hr",
  jobType: "full time",
  salary: "60000",
  experienceLevel: "",
  sortBy: "recent",
  limit: 0,
  page: 0,
